blocks.text: Thank you, that settles who holds sign-off. I am partway through checking each claim in the draft against the source documents your finance team provided, and most of them reconcile cleanly. A couple of the numbers on the {{fact:f:E-2023-001.client}} revenue history do not yet tie back to a source I can cite, and I would rather confirm those with you than carry a figure I cannot stand behind.

Could you tell me whether those two lines should quote the audited numbers or the internally reported ones? Once I know which basis you want used, I can close out the fact check and pass a clean draft to John Macias for his read before anything reaches you.
